nodes.label: AI for communication refinement
nodes.label_negative: AI as sole content creator without human oversight
nodes.grounding_span: AI helped me refine my wording and provided feedback

nodes.label: AI as research starting point
nodes.label_negative: AI as sole authoritative source without verification
nodes.grounding_span: I used it to get some background information on some of the assays I would run

nodes.label: AI practicality of experimental designs
nodes.label_negative: AI as absent or unreliable in design critique
nodes.grounding_span: I would like it to be able to critique my experimental design and analysis

nodes.label: AI trustworthiness and verification
nodes.label_negative: Distrust in AI due to inability to catch errors or hallucinations
nodes.grounding_span: I felt wary of relying on AI when I may not be able to tell if it's reasoning was faulty or it was hallucinating

nodes.label: Scientific rigor and accuracy
nodes.grounding_span: I made sure never to use exclusively AI to get information however, and to always double-check my sources

nodes.label: Efficiency and cost reduction
nodes.grounding_span: it would be very valuable to have fool-proof way of making sure my design is sound before I spend the resources on it

nodes.label: Effective communication
nodes.grounding_span: I wanted to make sure that everyone could understand the research and results, without it being too 'dumbed down'

nodes.label: Optimism about training others to use AI safely
nodes.grounding_span: I was not very proficient in AI yet at this point so I didn't use it too extensively

nodes.label: Positive anticipation of AI as peer reviewer for experimental design
nodes.grounding_span: I would like it to be able to critique my experimental design and analysis

nodes.label: Verification-oriented — cross-checks AI outputs against other sources
nodes.grounding_span: I made sure never to use exclusively AI to get information however, and to always double-check my sources

nodes.label: Risk-based decision framework for AI adoption
nodes.grounding_span: I didn't understand AI quite as well as I do now, and didn't know where it excelled and where it fell short
